commands.review_summary:
The PR records streamed NO_REPLY lead-fragment provenance in Gateway chat state, suppresses matching final Control UI chat payloads, adds regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main suppresses NO_ while streaming, stores that buffer, then finalizes with lead-fragment suppression disabled, so lifecycle end at NO_ can emit a final message. I did not run a live Gateway/WebChat reproduction in this read-only review.
